_meta.keyKnowledge: We reflect on, analyse, evaluate and document our own and others' media works to refine and inform our choices throughout the production process.

_source.w: We reflect on, analyse, evaluate and document our own and others' media works to refine and inform our choices throughout the production process.
y: Critical evaluation of media at this level requires sophisticated understanding of how media constructs meaning.
Continuous reflection throughout production leads to more intentional and effective creative decisions.
Analytical skills developed in media arts transfer to critical engagement with all forms of media.
eg: We write detailed critical analyses of professional media works using media theory and terminology.
We evaluate our production work against artistic intentions, technical standards and audience impact.
We analyse how media practitioners use codes and conventions to position audiences.
We maintain comprehensive production journals documenting decisions, reflections and evaluations.
We compare contrasting media approaches to similar content and evaluate their effectiveness.
We use audience research and feedback to refine our production decisions.
